subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the realms of inner significance! In these days when the winds of tests and trials have encompassed all the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب عوالم معانی در این ایام که اریاح افتتان از جمیع جهات آفاقرا احاطه نموده است
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @light and darkness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
